case_title: MEI FANG LISA ZHANG VS. LI RONG CHEN

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,520.00 FILED BY ZHANG, MEI FANG LISA AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, LI RONG ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-28-2011 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED SEP-15-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHEN, LI RONG

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-28-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-28-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT. MARIAN KONG AND BRANDON CHEN INTERPRET ENGLISH/MANDARIN - MANDARIN/ENGLISH ON BEHALF OF THE PARTIES. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-28-2011 - JUDGMENT.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZHANG, MEI FANG LISA IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT CHEN, LI RONG STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
